description: My Lingo — prompt optimization and language learning for Claude Code.

SessionStart.description: Triggers catchup analysis for unanalyzed turns from prior sessions via detached spawn.

UserPromptSubmit.description: All filtering happens inside the script. Skips: (1) slash commands '/', (2) prompts under 8 chars, (3) pure code blocks, (4) URL/shell prefixes. Special prefixes handled before skip logic: '--' (skip optimization, pass through) and '::' (force refine mode).

Stop.description: Captures Claude's text response from the transcript JSONL after each turn. Fast (<200ms), no API calls, always exits 0. Response data enriches SessionEnd learning analysis.
